subject_b: Guests can't find your hours or menu before visiting
subject_c: More private event bookings for insideOUT
body:
The open-air atrium with water features and Chef Johnny Duran's California-Mediterranean menu make insideOUT one of the most unique dining spots in Hillcrest — but your website is missing key details like hours, menu preview, and a way to book private events.

We built you a free preview — a redesigned homepage and a live AI chat agent that answers guest questions about reservations, dietary accommodations, and private event inquiries 24/7.

See it here: https://joshclifford.github.io/lvrg-previews/insideoutsd/index.html

Claim it free by booking a 15-min call: https://theresandiego.com/advertise/

Josh | LVRG Agency | lvrg.com | 619.361.7484
